arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta Drops Big Hint on Thomas Partey Replacement for Arsenal vs PSG First Leg Clash
arts.sum: Arsenal are through to the UEFA Champions League semifinals after beating Real Madrid 2-1 in the second leg of their quarterfinal, sealing an impressive 5-1 aggregate win to set up a showdown with Paris Saint-Germain. But despite the dominant display, one pundit has raised a concern heading into the first leg. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta Drops Big Bukayo Saka Injury Update Ahead of Arsenal-PSG Clash
arts.sum: Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain are set to clash in the UEFA Champions League semifinals, with just 180 minutes separating one of these teams from a place in the final. Although they previously met in the group stage, one pundit suggests that match should be left behind. arts.ttl: Liverpool, PSG Target Makes Huge Future Call Amid Chelsea and Real Madrid Transfer Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were interested in Dean Huijsen last summer as part of their defensive rebuild, but the Spanish center-back chose a move to AFC Bournemouth instead. If PSG come calling again, they won’t be alone in the race. arts.ttl: Man Utd & Man City battle PSG for €80m Ligue 1 star
arts.sum: Man Utd & Man City are both credited with interest in Monaco winger Maghnes Akliouche.
